title: aloysia sellowii
intro: Aloysia sellowii, also known as Sello's beebrush or Sello's false beebrush, is a flowering plant in the mint family that belongs to the genus Aloysia. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aloysia sellowii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and lower blood pressure. Aloysia sellowii can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
